changelog: v378 — Leak + crash fix: EpisodeModitions runtime-badge observer
The AdapterDataObserver was registered on the episode RecyclerView adapter but NEVER unregistered
It leaked Activity + View references for the lifetime of the adapter
Observer now self-unregisters when the RecyclerView detaches (fragment teardown / navigation)
postDelayed callbacks now guard against detached views — no more badge work on recycled views
Removes 4 unsafe !! assertions in async observer callbacks
message: v378 - Leak + crash fix: self-unregistering EpisodeModitions runtime-badge observer
